name: Liberty Shoes Limited
summary: Liberty Shoes Limited manufactures and trades in footwear, accessories, and lifestyle products in India and internationally. The company offers footwear products, such as casual, formal, sports, fashion, women, kids, and men footwear under the AHA, Coolers, Footfun, Force 10, Fortune, Gliders, Healers, Leap7X, Perfect, and Senorita brands. It operates through 100 distributors and 425 exclusive showrooms, as well as online. Liberty Shoes Limited was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Karnal, India.
